#3 JDG RICHARD KOSSOW. CSR MARCIA HOLMES. CLERK MSANCHEZ. 9:30AM C/C COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, MERCEDES GAVIN; DEFTS NOT PRESENT. 9:35AM PLTF WITNESS SERGIO IANTORNO S & E ON DIRECT. PLTF EXH #1 ID EV - THREE DAY NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. AND AGAINST DEFTS FOR POSSESION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 3301 MISSION STREET, #302 S.F. WRIT MAY BE ISSUED IMMEDIATELY. RENT AND DAMAGES $1425. ATTORNEY FEES $300. AND COSTS $0. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT THE PLTF RECOVER FROM DEFTS RICARDO PEREZ AND SOLON VEGA ONLY $950. FOR RENT AND DAMAGES. LEASE OR AGREEMENT FORFEITED. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT THE PRIOR JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION WAS ERRONEOUSLY ENTERED AND IS HEREBY VACATED NUNC PRO TUNC.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THIS CASE IS TO BE CONSIDERED SETTLED AS TO DEFENDANTS RICARDO PEREZ AND SOLON VEGA PURSUANT TO STIPULATED JUDGMENT SIGNED BY THESE TWO DEFENDANTS ON 12/8/93 AT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THIS CASE IS CONTINUED FOR COURT TRIAL AS TO DEFENDANT MARIA ROSA GALDAMEZ ON 12/15/93 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT #1 S. F. MUNICIPAL COURT AS GALDAMEZ LEFT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITHOUT INFORMING THE JUDGE OF HER DEPARTURE PER JUDGE DONALDSON SHE IS TO APPEAR FOR COURT TRIAL 12/15/93.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, RICARDO VEGA, SOLON GALDAMEZ, MARIA ROSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3301 MISSION STREET #302 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,375.00 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-03-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, RICARDO PEREZ & SOLON VEGA STIP. TO JUDGMENT OWING $950 TOTA L. MARIA ROSA GALDAMEZ BY TRIAL OWING $1,425 & $300 ATTY FEES. PRIOR JUDGMENT OF 12-8-93 VACATED. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
